Notice Of Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jul-30-2015 Continued To Aug-31-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs is continued to August 31, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 30, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg
